tasks.name: Before Hire Pack
tasks.description: Tidy the laptop, check the baseline, then test the network.
tasks.help: Fix the failed step before releasing the laptop. If the network step fails, run Network Deep Diagnostics.

tasks.name: After Hire Pack
tasks.description: Log out web services, preserve Microsoft 365, then check app drift.
tasks.help: If declientify fails, manually check Microsoft 365 in Word or PowerPoint before running cleanup again.

tasks.name: Declientify Only
tasks.description: Clear browser/web-client sessions while preserving Microsoft 365.
tasks.help: Open Word or PowerPoint and check File > Account if Microsoft 365 cannot be confirmed.

tasks.name: Network Test
tasks.description: Compare active Wi-Fi and Ethernet connections against showtime.mav.z9t.me.
tasks.help: Check Wi-Fi/Ethernet connection, DNS, and whether showtime.mav.z9t.me is reachable. Run Network Deep Diagnostics for details.

tasks.name: Network Deep Diagnostics
tasks.description: Run DNS, adapter, gateway, HTTPS, and iperf-port checks against showtime.mav.z9t.me.
tasks.help: If HTTPS works but iperf fails, check the iperf3 service and firewall on showtime.mav.z9t.me port 5201.

tasks.name: Pre-Hire Prep Only
tasks.description: Tidy files, set MAV wallpaper, and check disk and Microsoft 365 state.
tasks.help: Check the generated report for low disk space, large archived files, or Microsoft 365 warnings.

tasks.name: Baseline Audit Only
tasks.description: Compare installed programs against the configured baseline.
tasks.help: Update baseline-programs.json if the detected app list is expected, or uninstall unexpected client software.
